name: CTAC N.V.  EO-,24
summary: Ctac N.V. provides business and cloud integration services primarily in the Netherlands, Belgium, and France. The company's services cover management, configuration, development, and users training; solution adoption, which include change, communication, and learning and performance; functional, technical, and integrated application management; and resourcing. It provides solutions in the areas of customer experience, which cover marketing, sales and service, product information management, and e-commerce and CMS; cloud as-a-service, integration, and security; data and analytics in the areas of master data management, business intelligence, and enterprise performance management; application and integration development; ERP and digital core that include SAP S/4HANA and Mendix; and smart workplace, user adoption, and managed services. The company also provides XV Retail, a point of sale cash register system and retail solution for food and non-food retailers; and Omni Customer Loyalty, a retail loyalty program. It primarily serves retail, wholesale, manufacturing, real estate, and social enterprise markets. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in √Ç¬ës-Hertogenbosch, the Netherlands.
